objectives.name: Global Information Field Integration
objectives.description: Establish seamless real-time integration with global data flows and information nodes.

objectives.name: Cross-Boundary Awareness
objectives.description: Enable agents to maintain state and awareness across different physical and virtual environments simultaneously.

objectives.name: Ubiquitous Execution
objectives.description: Capability to execute tasks through the most optimal node in the global network, regardless of the user's current interface.
